meaning: n.宠物,受宠爱的人,不悦adj.宠爱的,亲昵的vt.宠爱vi.拥抱,爱抚,生气,发脾气
examples: They had had their pet dog stuffed.
I sell my surplus birds to a local pet shop.
The family pet was left in the trust of a neighbour.
Brown is now doing some consulting work and is unable to pursue his pet project.
When you scratch its chin or pet its back, it responds with a startlingly realistic panting noise.
